positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic jungle pattern featuring luminous bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central element is a stylized, ethereal constellation forming a giant, stylized fern leaf. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, glowing emerald, and accented with gold leaf speckling. The composition must be central and suitable for seamless apparel printing. Use a clean silhouette style with strong vector contrast. The lighting is dramatic and internal, emanating from the flora. Minimalist gothic jungle aesthetic, high contrast linework, ink wash quality, engraved botanical illustration style, perfect symmetry, central composition, designed for repeat tiling.
negative: low resolution, blur, fuzzy, noisy, cropped, artifact, text, watermark, signature, messy, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, out of frame, logo, trademark
